name: frontpeek
description: POC: React/Next.js app preview with a component inspector (click to open the source code)

frontPeek.proxyPort.markdownDescription: Fixed port for the local preview proxy. `0` (default) picks a random free port each session. Set a fixed port so the preview always runs at the same origin (`http://localhost:<port>`). This is useful for apps behind an identity provider (Okta, Auth0, Cognito, …) that validates the request origin: add `http://localhost:<port>` once to the provider's **Trusted Origins** and **Redirect URIs**, and OAuth/SSO logins will complete inside the preview. If the port is already in use, the extension falls back to a random port and warns.
